nothingToVoteDesc: Pick a few candidate places first — then come back here to rank them with your group.
noPlacesPickedDesc: Tap any spot on the map (cafés, attractions, restaurants…) and add it as a candidate.
planPlacesHelper: Pick candidate places to put up for the group.
votePlacesHelper: Help decide the itinerary by voting for your favorite spots.
tipClickMap: Tip: click any place on the map to add it.
